channel.title: untagged on Ameya Thete
channel.description: Recent content in untagged on Ameya Thete

item.title: Hello, World.
item.description: > Hello, World! Seeing those words appear on a terminal screen for the first time after painstakingly sifting through dense material evokes an unparalleled emotion. Perhaps that is what programming is all about — a quest to replicate whatever you felt after printing your first “Hello, World!” statement. As I navigate the forests of all knowledge, I will often go astray (read procrastinate) and I’d like to document the wonderful things I find as I do that.
